name: PortMaster
summary: Install, launch, repair, and verify PortMaster on Leaf for MLP1.
description: PortMaster for Leaf is a first-party optional manager for the Miniloong Pocket 1. It installs the upstream PortMaster app, managed UI runtime, and locked armhf compatibility pack into user data, verifies downloads, records a Leaf manifest, and provides automatic repair.
author: Utility Muffin Research Kitchen

notes.distribution: Pak Rat first-party optional app; not bundled in base Leaf.
